title: proorizo #4309
definition:
1) to predetermine, decide beforehand
 2) in the NT of God decreeing from eternity
 3) to foreordain, appoint beforehand
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) to predetermine, decide beforehand
 2) in the NT of God decreeing from eternity
 3) to foreordain, appoint beforehand

    NASB:  to predetermine, foreordain:
